title: PC Deals Weekly Update: July 13, 2003
author: Peter S. Kastner
abstract: Nothing very exciting happening in desktop deals this week. Dell has replaced its Dimension 2350 with the newer 2400, but we have yet to notice any difference in these models other than a price drop. EMachines' and HP's newest desktops dominate the weekly deals flyers from Best Buy and Circuit City this week.
importance_rationale: Contemporaneous Kastner commentary tracking the 2002-2003 post-bubble PC price war in real time; paired with the access aggregate dataset for the same period.
relevance_rationale: Primary-source expert commentary on retail PC market dynamics; valuable for historians of the Wintel/AMD price war and consumer tech retail consolidation.
prescience_rationale: Near-term forecasts (next-month Intel price cuts, HT adoption, form-factor shifts) can be verified against subsequent weeks in the series.
